zh.lifeSummary: 當Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch於1460年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，他的父親Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie62歲，母親Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray40歲。他和Anne MacDonald至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1528年9月8日在蘇格蘭洛-爾蓋爾洛享年68歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch于1460年出生在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾时，他的父亲Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie62岁，母亲Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray40岁。他和Anne MacDonald至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1528年9月8日在苏格兰洛-爾蓋爾洛享年68岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Hector
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name borne in classical legend by the Trojan champion who was killed by the Greek Achilles. His name (Greek Hektōr) is probably an agent derivative of Greek ekhein ‘to restrain’. It was never popular in England, but there are occasional examples from the Middle Ages. In Scotland it was used as a classicized form of the Gaelic personal name Eachann, which is composed of each ‘horse’ + donn ‘brown’. It has been moderately popular in the United States since the 1940s.

nameMeanings.name: Roy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Scottish name, representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic nickname Ruadh ‘red’. It has since spread to other parts of the English-speaking world, where it is often reanalysed as Old French roy ‘king’ ( compare Leroy ).

nameMeanings.name: Eachainn
meanings: Gaelic: The Gaelic form of Hector.

en.lifeSummary: When Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch was born in 1460, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, was 62 and his mother, Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray, was 40. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Anne MacDonald. He died on 8 September 1528, in Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 68, and was buried in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch est né en 1460, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Anne MacDonald. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1528, à Gairloch, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch 1460 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie 62 und seine Mutter Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray 40. Er hatte mit Anne MacDonald mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. September 1528 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch è nato il nel 1460 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, aveva 62 anni e il suo madre, Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Anne MacDonald. Morì il 8 settembre 1528, nel Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairlochが1460年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzieは62歳，母Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Morayは40歳であった。彼はAnne MacDonaldとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1528年9月8日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアガイルロチで68歳で死去し，スコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch(이)가 1460년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Anne MacDonald(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1528년 9월 8일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 게어럭에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch nasceu em 1460, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Anne MacDonald. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1528, em Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch родился в 1460 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray, 40. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Anne MacDonald. Он умер 8 сентября 1528 г. в местности геирлоч, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hector Roy - Eachainn Ruadh Mackenzie 1st of Gairloch nació en 1460, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Mackenzie 6th of Kintail, 1st Chief of Clan Mackenzie, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Margaret M'Coull MacDonald of Moray, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Anne MacDonald. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1528, en Gairloch, Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland.
